q: In an _______ process, the volume is constant so that work done is zero.
Which of the following fields is primarily concerned with the study of systems involving energy in the form of heat and work?
_______ is the ratio of the total emissive power of an object to that of the blackbody, at the same temperature and wavelength.
In fluid, heat is mainly transferred by _______.
Isochoric process occurs at constant _______.
SI unit of thermal conductivity of the material is _______.
a: watt per metre kelvin (W m⁻¹ K⁻¹)
